description.description of test case: Decomposed four-chamber closed-loop heart model equivalent to closedLoopHeart_singleVessel.json. Uses individual ChamberElastanceInductor, ValveTanh, BloodVessel, and BloodVesselRC blocks instead of the monolithic ClosedLoopHeartAndPulmonary block. Parameters from Sankaran et al. 2012 and Menon et al. 2023.
description.circuit: RA -> TV -> RV -> PV -> pul_vessel -> LA -> MV -> LV -> AV -> aortic_cap -> branch0_seg0 -> sys_Rp -> sys_Rd -> RA

parameter mapping._comment_: Mapping from monolithic ClosedLoopHeartAndPulmonary parameters to individual block parameters. See closedLoopHeart_singleVessel.json for original values. Conversion: pConv = 1333.34 (mmHg to dyn/cm^2).
parameter mapping.chambers: Emax from Erv_s/Elv_s/Emax_ra/Emax_la. Impedance (L) from Lrv_a/Llv_a/Lra_v/Lla_v. Atria use exponential passive P-V (Kxp/Kxv/Vaso).
parameter mapping.valves: Rmin from Rrv_a/Rlv_ao/Rra_v/Rla_v. ValveTanh replaces the monolithic hard on/off valve.
parameter mapping.pulmonary: BloodVesselRC (flow-through RC windkessel, Q_in=Q_out) from Rpd/Cp. Matches Sankaran 2012 eq. X6'=X4-X7.
parameter mapping.systemic: ClosedLoopRCR (Rp/Rd/C) decomposed into BloodVessel(R=Rp,C) + BloodVessel(R=Rd). Aortic capacitance Cpa as BloodVessel(R=0,C=Cpa).

vessels._comment_: Pulmonary vasculature: flow-through RC windkessel (Sankaran 2012, eq. X6'=X4-X7). Rpd = 1.120725*Rpd_base/pConv, Cp from monolithic.
Aortic capacitance (Cpa=0.556854 from monolithic). R=0 so this is a pure capacitor.
Aorta. R = 4.464119/pConv, L = 5.25/pConv. Same as closedLoopHeart_singleVessel.json.
Systemic proximal R+C. Replaces ClosedLoopRCR Rp. C = 0.228215*1.044637, Rp = 0.09*R_total.
Systemic distal R. Replaces ClosedLoopRCR Rd. Rd = 0.91*R_total.

chambers._comment_: Right atrium. Emax=Emax_ra, Impedance=Lra_v. Exponential passive P-V (Kxp_ra/Kxv_ra/Vaso_ra). Wrapping cosine activation matches atrial AA(t) from Sankaran 2012.
chambers.name: RA

chambers._comment_: Right ventricle. Emax~Erv_s (see note), Impedance=Lrv_a, Vrd=Vrs=Vrv_u. Fourier activation from Tran's tuning framework (Menon 2023).
chambers.name: RV

chambers._comment_: Left atrium. Emax=Emax_la, Impedance=Lla_v. Exponential passive P-V (Kxp_la/Kxv_la/Vaso_la). Wrapping cosine activation matches atrial AA(t) from Sankaran 2012.
chambers.name: LA

chambers._comment_: Left ventricle. Emax~Elv_s (see note), Impedance=Llv_a, Vrd=Vrs=Vlv_u. Fourier activation from Tran's tuning framework (Menon 2023).
chambers.name: LV

valves._comment_: Tricuspid valve. Rmin=Rra_v. Smooth tanh approximation of monolithic hard on/off valve.
valves.name: TV
